# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Production Deployment Pipeline
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production
    permissions:
      contents: read
      deployments: write

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Log Safe Build Context
        run: |
          echo "=== Build Context ==="
          echo "Repository: ${{ github.repository }}"
          echo "Branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}"
          echo "Commit SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Commit Message: ${{ github.event.head_commit.message }}"
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Event: ${{ github.event_name }}"
          echo "Run ID: ${{ github.run_id }}"
          echo "Run Number: ${{ github.run_number }}"
          echo "Runner OS: ${{ runner.os }}"
          echo "Runner Arch: ${{ runner.arch }}"
          echo "Workflow: ${{ github.workflow }}"
          echo "Timestamp: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"

      - name: Log Safe Environment Variables Only
        run: |
          echo "=== Safe Environment Variables ==="
          echo "NODE_ENV: ${NODE_ENV:-not set}"
          echo "CI: ${CI:-not set}"
          echo "GITHUB_ACTIONS: ${GITHUB_ACTIONS:-not set}"
          echo "RUNNER_OS: ${RUNNER_OS:-not set}"
          echo "RUNNER_TEMP: ${RUNNER_TEMP:-not set}"

          echo ""
          echo "=== Filtering environment (excluding secrets) ==="
          # Only log non-sensitive env vars by allowlisting known safe prefixes
          env | grep -E '^(GITHUB_ACTION|GITHUB_ACTOR|GITHUB_REF|GITHUB_SHA|GITHUB_REPOSITORY|GITHUB_RUN|GITHUB_WORKFLOW|GITHUB_EVENT|RUNNER_|CI=|NODE_ENV|HOME|PATH|LANG|LC_)' | sort

          echo ""
          echo "NOTE: Secrets, tokens, API keys, and connection strings are intentionally excluded from logs."

      - name: Mask all secrets before any usage
        run: |
          # Register all secrets as masked values so they never appear in logs
          # GitHub Actions automatically masks secrets referenced via ${{ secrets.* }}
          # but we add explicit masking for any derived values
          if [ -n "${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL }}" ]; then
            echo "::add-mask::${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL }}"
          fi
          if [ -n "${{ secrets.API_KEY }}" ]; then
            echo "::add-mask::${{ secrets.API_KEY }}"
          fi
          if [ -n "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}" ]; then
            echo "::add-mask::${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}"
          fi
          if [ -n "${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}" ]; then
            echo "::add-mask::${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}"
          fi
          if [ -n "${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}" ]; then
            echo "::add-mask::${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}"
          fi
          if [ -n "${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}" ]; then
            echo "::add-mask::${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}"
          fi

          echo "All secret values have been registered for masking."

      - name: Validate secrets are configured
        run: |
          echo "=== Secrets Configuration Check ==="
          # Check that required secrets exist WITHOUT logging their values
          MISSING_SECRETS=0

          if [ -z "${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL }}" ]; then
            echo "::warning::SECRET MISSING: DATABASE_URL is not configured"
            MISSING_SECRETS=$((MISSING_SECRETS + 1))
          else
            echo "✓ DATABASE_URL is configured (value masked)"
          fi

          if [ -z "${{ secrets.API_KEY }}" ]; then
            echo "::warning::SECRET MISSING: API_KEY is not configured"
            MISSING_SECRETS=$((MISSING_SECRETS + 1))
          else
            echo "✓ API_KEY is configured (value masked)"
          fi

          if [ -z "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}" ]; then
            echo "::warning::SECRET MISSING: DEPLOY_TOKEN is not configured"
            MISSING_SECRETS=$((MISSING_SECRETS + 1))
          else
            echo "✓ DEPLOY_TOKEN is configured (value masked)"
          fi

          echo ""
          echo "Secrets check complete. Missing: ${MISSING_SECRETS}"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          echo "=== Installing Dependencies ==="
          npm ci 2>&1 | tee /tmp/npm-install.log
          EXIT_CODE=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
          echo "npm ci exit code: ${EXIT_CODE}"
          if [ ${EXIT_CODE} -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::error::npm ci failed with exit code ${EXIT_CODE}"
            echo "=== Last 50 lines of install log ==="
            tail -50 /tmp/npm-install.log
            exit ${EXIT_CODE}
          fi
          echo "✓ Dependencies installed successfully"
          echo "Node version: $(node --version)"
          echo "NPM version: $(npm --version)"

      - name: Run linting
        run: |
          echo "=== Running Linter ==="
          npm run lint 2>&1 | tee /tmp/lint.log
          EXIT_CODE=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
          echo "Lint exit code: ${EXIT_CODE}"
          if [ ${EXIT_CODE} -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::warning::Linting issues found"
            cat /tmp/lint.log
          else
            echo "✓ Linting passed"
          fi

      - name: Run tests with coverage
        run: |
          echo "=== Running Tests ==="
          npm test -- --coverage 2>&1 | tee /tmp/test.log
          EXIT_CODE=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
          echo "Test exit code: ${EXIT_CODE}"
          if [ ${EXIT_CODE} -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::error::Tests failed with exit code ${EXIT_CODE}"
            echo "=== Full Test Output ==="
            cat /tmp/test.log
            exit ${EXIT_CODE}
          fi
          echo "✓ All tests passed"

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          echo "=== Building Application ==="
          npm run build 2>&1 | tee /tmp/build.log
          EXIT_CODE=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
          echo "Build exit code: ${EXIT_CODE}"
          if [ ${EXIT_CODE} -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::error::Build failed with exit code ${EXIT_CODE}"
            echo "=== Build Error Output ==="
            cat /tmp/build.log
            exit ${EXIT_CODE}
          fi
          echo "✓ Build completed successfully"

          echo ""
          echo "=== Build Artifacts ==="
          if [ -d "dist" ]; then
            echo "dist/ directory contents:"
            find dist -type f | head -50
            echo "Total files: $(find dist -type f | wc -l)"
            echo "Total size: $(du -sh dist | cut -f1)"
          elif [ -d "build" ]; then
            echo "build/ directory contents:"
            find build -type f | head -50
            echo "Total files: $(find build -type f | wc -l)"
            echo "Total size: $(du -sh build | cut -f1)"
          else
            echo "::warning::No dist/ or build/ directory found"
          fi

      - name: Test database connectivity
        if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Database Connectivity Check ==="
          # Extract host and port safely WITHOUT logging the full connection string
          DB_HOST=$(echo "${DATABASE_URL}" | sed -E 's|.*@([^:/]+).*|\1|' 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
          DB_PORT=$(echo "${DATABASE_URL}" | sed -E 's|.*:([0-9]+)/.*|\1|' 2>/dev/null || echo "5432")
          DB_NAME=$(echo "${DATABASE_URL}" | sed -E 's|.*/([^?]+).*|\1|' 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")

          # Mask extracted components too
          echo "::add-mask::${DB_HOST}"

          echo "Database host: [MASKED]"
          echo "Database port: ${DB_PORT}"
          echo "Database name: ${DB_NAME}"

          # Test TCP connectivity only
          if timeout 10 bash -c "echo > /dev/tcp/${DB_HOST}/${DB_PORT}" 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "✓ Database host is reachable on port ${DB_PORT}"
          else
            echo "::error::Cannot reach database host on port ${DB_PORT}"
            echo "Troubleshooting tips:"
            echo "  - Verify DATABASE_URL secret is correct"
            echo "  - Check if database server is running"
            echo "  - Verify network/firewall rules allow access from GitHub Actions"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Test API endpoint connectivity
        if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        env:
          API_KEY: ${{ secrets.API_KEY }}
          API_BASE_URL: ${{ vars.API_BASE_URL }}
        run: |
          echo "=== API Connectivity Check ==="
          API_URL="${API_BASE_URL:-https://api.example.com}"
          echo "API Base URL: ${API_URL}"

          # Health check endpoint (no auth required typically)
          echo "Testing health endpoint..."
          HEALTH_RESPONSE=$(curl -s -o /tmp/health_response.txt -w "%{http_code}|%{time_total}|%{size_download}" \
            --max-time 30 \
            "${API_URL}/health" 2>&1) || true

          HTTP_CODE=$(echo "${HEALTH_RESPONSE}" | cut -d'|' -f1)
          RESPONSE_TIME=$(echo "${HEALTH_RESPONSE}" | cut -d'|' -f2)
          RESPONSE_SIZE=$(echo "${HEALTH_RESPONSE}" | cut -d'|' -f3)

          echo "Health check HTTP status: ${HTTP_CODE}"
          echo "Response time: ${RESPONSE_TIME}s"
          echo "Response size: ${RESPONSE_SIZE} bytes"

          if [ "${HTTP_CODE}" -ge 200 ] && [ "${HTTP_CODE}" -lt 300 ]; then
            echo "✓ API health check passed"
            # Log health response body (should not contain secrets)
            echo "Health response:"
            cat /tmp/health_response.txt
          else
            echo "::warning::API health check returned HTTP ${HTTP_CODE}"
            echo "Response body:"
            cat /tmp/health_response.txt
          fi

          echo ""
          echo "Testing authenticated endpoint..."
          # Use auth endpoint but NEVER log the API key or auth tokens
          AUTH_RESPONSE=$(curl -s -o /tmp/auth_response.txt -w "%{http_code}" \
            --max-time 30 \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer ${API_KEY}" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            "${API_URL}/api/v1/status" 2>&1) || true

          echo "Auth endpoint HTTP status: ${AUTH_RESPONSE}"

          # Sanitize response before logging - remove any tokens/keys that might be echoed back
          if [ -f /tmp/auth_response.txt ]; then
            # Strip potential sensitive fields from JSON response before logging
            SAFE_RESPONSE=$(cat /tmp/auth_response.txt | \
              sed -E 's/"(token|key|secret|password|authorization|cookie|session)[^"]*":\s*"[^"]*"/"\1":"[REDACTED]"/gi')
            echo "Sanitized API response:"
            echo "${SAFE_RESPONSE}"
          fi

          if [ "${AUTH_RESPONSE}" -eq 401 ] || [ "${AUTH_RESPONSE}" -eq 403 ]; then
            echo "::error::API authentication failed (HTTP ${AUTH_RESPONSE}). Verify API_KEY secret."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Deploy application
        if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          DEPLOY_URL: ${{ vars.DEPLOY_URL }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Starting Deployment ==="
          echo "Deploy target: ${DEPLOY_URL:-https://deploy.example.com}"
          echo "Deploying commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Deploying branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}"
          echo "Deployment initiated by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Timestamp: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"

          DEPLOY_TARGET="${DEPLOY_URL:-https://deploy.example.com}"

          # Perform deployment - log status codes and timing, NOT tokens
          DEPLOY_RESPONSE=$(curl -s -o /tmp/deploy_response.txt \
            -w "http_code:%{http_code}|time_total:%{time_total}|time_connect:%{time_connect}|time_starttransfer:%{time_starttransfer}" \
            --max-time 300 \
            -X POST \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer ${DEPLOY_TOKEN}" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -d "{\"ref\":\"${{ github.sha }}\",\"environment\":\"production\",\"auto_merge\":false}" \
            "${DEPLOY_TARGET}/api/deploy" 2>&1) || true

          echo ""
          echo "=== Deployment Response Metrics ==="
          echo "${DEPLOY_RESPONSE}" | tr '|' '\n'

          HTTP_CODE=$(echo "${DEPLOY_RESPONSE}" | grep -oP 'http_code:\K[0-9]+')

          # Sanitize deployment response before logging
          if [ -f /tmp/deploy_response.txt ]; then
            SAFE_DEPLOY_RESPONSE=$(cat /tmp/deploy_response.txt | \
              sed -E 's/"(token|key|secret|password|authorization|cookie|session|credential)[^"]*":\s*"[^"]*"/"\1":"[REDACTED]"/gi' | \
              sed -E 's/"(url|endpoint)[^"]*":\s*"[^"]*[?&](token|key|secret|auth)=[^"&]*/"url":"[URL_WITH_REDACTED_PARAMS]/gi')
            echo "Sanitized deployment response:"
            echo "${SAFE_DEPLOY_RESPONSE}" | head -100
          fi

          if [ "${HTTP_CODE}" -ge 200 ] && [ "${HTTP_CODE}" -lt 300 ]; then
            echo "✓ Deployment request accepted (HTTP ${HTTP_CODE})"
          else
            echo "::error::Deployment failed with HTTP ${HTTP_CODE}"
            echo "Troubleshooting:"
            echo "  - Verify DEPLOY_TOKEN secret is valid and not expired"
            echo "  - Check deployment service status"
            echo "  - Review sanitized response above for error details"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Post-deployment verification
        if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        env:
          APP_URL: ${{ vars.APP_URL }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Post-Deployment Verification ==="
          TARGET_URL="${APP_URL:-https://app.example.com}"
          echo "Verifying deployment at: ${TARGET_URL}"

          # Wait for deployment to propagate
          echo "Waiting 30 seconds for deployment to propagate..."
          sleep 30

          MAX_RETRIES=5
          RETRY_DELAY=15
          SUCCESS=false

          for i in $(seq 1 ${MAX_RETRIES}); do
            echo ""
            echo "Verification attempt ${i}/${MAX_RETRIES}..."

            VERIFY_RESPONSE=$(curl -s -o /tmp/verify_response.txt \
              -w "%{http_code}|%{time_total}" \
              --max-time 30 \
              "${TARGET_URL}/health" 2>&1) || true

            V_HTTP_CODE=$(echo "${VERIFY_RESPONSE}" | cut -d'|' -f1)
            V_TIME=$(echo "${VERIFY_RESPONSE}" | cut -d'|' -f2)

            echo "HTTP Status: ${V_HTTP_CODE}"
            echo "Response Time: ${V_TIME}s"

            if [ "${V_HTTP_CODE}" -ge 200 ] && [ "${V_HTTP_CODE}" -lt 300 ]; then
              echo "✓ Application is responding correctly"
              cat /tmp/verify_response.txt
              SUCCESS=true
              break
            else
              echo "Application returned HTTP ${V_HTTP_CODE}, retrying in ${RETRY_DELAY}s..."
              if [ ${i} -lt ${MAX_RETRIES} ]; then
                sleep ${RETRY_DELAY}
              fi
            fi
          done

          if [ "${SUCCESS}" = false ]; then
            echo "::error::Post-deployment verification failed after ${MAX_RETRIES} attempts"
            echo "The application may not be healthy. Manual investigation required."
            exit 1
          fi

          echo ""
          echo "=== Deployment Summary ==="
          echo "Status: SUCCESS"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}"
          echo "Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Completed: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"

      - name: Upload debug logs as artifact
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: debug-logs-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: /tmp/*.log
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: ignore

      - name: Notify on failure
        if: failure()
        env:
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Sending Failure Notification ==="
          # Only send if webhook is configured
          if [ -n "${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}" ]; then
            curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Notification HTTP status: %{http_code}\n" \
              --max-time 10 \
              -X POST \
              -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
              -d "{
                \"text\": \"🚨 Deployment Failed\",
                \"blocks\": [
                  {
                    \"type\": \"section\",
                    \"text\": {
                      \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",
                      \"text\": \"*Deployment Failed*\nRepo: ${{ github.repository }}\nBranch: ${{ github.ref_name }}\nCommit: \`${{ github.sha }}\`\nActor: ${{ github.actor }}\nRun: <${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}|View Logs>\"
                    }
                  }
                ]
              }" \
              "${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}" || echo "::warning::Failed to send Slack notification"
          else
            echo "Slack webhook not configured, skipping notification"
          fi

      - name: Clean up sensitive files
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "=== Cleaning Up ==="
          # Remove any temporary files that might contain sensitive data
          rm -f /tmp/auth_response.txt
          rm -f /tmp/deploy_response.txt
          rm -f /tmp/health_response.txt
          rm -f /tmp/verify_response.txt
          echo "✓ Temporary files cleaned up"
